Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class CheckWithdrawalSchedule

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.CheckWithdrawalSchedule
public class CheckWithdrawalSchedule extends Object
CheckWithdrawalSchedule

A withdrawal transfer schedule using the Check mechanism

      Memos on the check. The max number of lines is 3, with max of 30 characters per line
